title: July 5th, 2021 (2)
body:
- daily notes
    - akabilly
    - professional
        - eye i aye yah lyrics
            - the mouth the mind the hand the he[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]
            - this is how i find my [[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]
            - the aye the eye the i the ah
            - the words i use to wonder why
            - i can't see beyond the pines
            - i ain't signin dotted lines
            - if you trust me this is why
            - cuz you watch me learn to fly
            - and i can bend and i can break
            - careful bout the road i take
            - know i mean the things i say
            - cuz i'm tryin to find a way
            - when i find it can't be stopped
            - til i reach the very top
            - of the mountain but who's countin
            - we all climbin different ones
            - up the mountain down the mountain
            - from the valleys to the sum
            - it's struggle, it's a grind
            - bangin with the rocks i mined
            - the feet the fang the fingertip
            - this is how i keep my grip
            - x2
            - the aye the eye the i the ah
            - windows through which i watch the sky
            - yada yada yada ya
            - it goes in here and out this side
            - the mouth the mind the hand the he[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]
            - this is how i built my ark
            - the aye the eye the i the ah
            - the would i use to keep me try
            - duck duck goose goose
            - the words the birds that i let loose
            - i can count twos
            - if you can't come then what's the use
            - the u, the you, the ewe, the yew
            - cuz you're the root i come back to
            - the mouth the mind the hand the he[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]
            - this is how i do my p[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]
        - so spiritual lyrics
            - not tryna prove my soul
            - fuck i know
            - fuck i go weeks without sleep
            - cuz i can't keep my eyes closed
            - i don't know if i'll know
            - who i am eer again
            - when i can't see my idols
            - my hope is a commodity
            - i focus on the quantity
            - go get it
            - keep it on me
            - spend it so you can see
            - spin it like jewelry
            - when you get it i want it
            - i resent it my poverty
            - when i'm in it it swallows me
            - when i feed it i wanna eat
            - i'm not whole i'm a hole
            - and the openness bothers me
            - when i see it i wanna flee
            - go weeks without sleep
            - cuz i keep seeing me honestly
            - go months without praying
            - i pay my fee at the pharmacy
            - say my peace when i'm on a beat
            - god may not hear me flow
            - but i still am, see? so
    - professional
